name: patent_id
description: The persistent ID of the patent.

name: family_id
description: Family ID of the patent, or a dummy id used for our purposes (structured as X-patent_id).

name: reliable
description: Whether or not the language id is reliable.

name: language_long
description: Long version of the language identified in the patent.

name: language
description: Short version of the language identified in the patent.
